claim_boundary: This preregistration freezes one finite falsification test and three exact theorem audits. It proves or refutes none of the four conjectures.

riemann.frozen_statement: In any test-function topology where evaluation at the identity is continuous, a cone of autocorrelations with nonnegative identity value is not dense in the full real test space if that space contains a function negative at the identity.
riemann.decision_rule: Retire dense-cone extension for this autocorrelation cone if the continuous evaluation separator is exact; retain direct all-autocorrelation Weil positivity as the target.

collatz.frozen_statement: A positive odd integer without finite stopping descent is equivalent to an eventually-low infinite path in the adaptive unresolved residue-cylinder tree.
collatz.decision_rule: Generic 2-adic paths with infinitely many high-child bits are not natural-number counterexamples; only eventually-low paths count.

goldbach.decision_rule: Accept the prime-power premise as closed only after proving the count and monotonic-tail steps with an explicit uniform B at H=4e18.

twin_prime.failure_interpretation: Refutes the frozen finite dyadic-contraction candidate only; it does not refute Twin Prime.
twin_prime.pass_interpretation: Adds one unseen finite transition only; it does not prove a uniform recurrence or Twin Prime.
